# Arteon Agency — Full Tool Documentation

> Arteon Agency is a web development, design, and marketing agency based in Poland. We provide 74 free browser-based tools for designers, developers, marketers, and content creators. All tools process data locally in the browser — no files are uploaded to any server. No registration required.

- Website: https://www.arteonagency.pl
- Contact: kontakt@arteonagency.pl
- Summary: https://www.arteonagency.pl/llms.txt

## Services

Arteon Agency offers professional services in:
- **Web development** — custom websites built with Next.js and WordPress
- **E-commerce** — online stores with payment integration
- **Graphic design** — logos, brand identity, print materials, social media templates
- **SEO & marketing** — search engine optimization, content marketing, audits
- **Content creation** — copywriting, blog articles, product descriptions

## Design & Media Tools

### Online Image Editor
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/online-image-editor
- Resize, crop, and convert images for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and websites.
- Features: ready-made templates for social media platforms, 3 crop shapes (rectangle, square, circle), custom dimensions, zoom and position control, export to JPG/PNG/WebP.
- Use cases: preparing social media posts, creating OG images, resizing photos for web.

### Favicon Generator
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/free-favicon-generator
- Generate favicon.ico and a complete set of PNG icons from a single image.
- Features: favicon.ico (16x16, 32x32, 48x48), PNG icons (192x192, 512x512), Apple Touch Icon (180x180), ready HTML meta tags, Lighthouse-compliant output.
- Use cases: adding favicon to a new website, updating brand icons, PWA icon generation.

### Email Signature Generator
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/free-email-signature-generator
- Create a professional HTML email signature with custom layout, colors, and social links.
- Features: 8 layouts, customizable colors and fonts, 12 social media platforms, CTA button, profile photo and company logo, disclaimer field, export/import settings.
- Use cases: creating consistent team signatures, personal branding, professional email communication.

### QR Code Generator
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/free-qr-code-generator
- Generate QR codes for URLs, vCards, text, email, and phone numbers.
- Features: 5 content types, customizable colors, adjustable size, 4 error correction levels, PNG and SVG export.
- Use cases: business cards, marketing materials, restaurant menus, event tickets.

### Color Palette Generator
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/color-palette-generator
- Generate 9 harmonious color palettes from a single base color.
- Features: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, analogous, split-complementary palettes, HEX/RGB/HSL output, one-click copy.
- Use cases: brand color selection, web design, UI design, graphic design projects.

### Image Color Extractor
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/image-color-extractor
- Extract up to 12 dominant colors from any uploaded image.
- Features: HEX/RGB/HSL color codes, one-click copy, supports JPG/PNG/WebP input.
- Use cases: extracting brand colors from logos, color matching, design inspiration.

### Color Contrast Checker (WCAG 2.1)
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/color-contrast-checker
- Check if text and background colors meet WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards.
- Features: real-time contrast ratio calculation, AA/AAA pass/fail indicators, color picker, hex/RGB input, live text preview.
- Use cases: accessibility audits, ensuring readable text, WCAG compliance checks.

## SEO & Text Tools

### Word & Character Counter
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/word-and-character-counter
- Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, unique words, and estimate reading time.
- Features: word count, character count (with/without spaces), paragraph count, reading time, text length evaluation for 6 page types, letter case conversion, line sorting, duplicate removal.
- Use cases: checking blog post length, SEO content optimization, academic writing requirements.

### Meta Title & Description Checker
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/meta-title-description-length-checker
- Check meta title and description length with Google SERP preview.
- Features: character counter, word counter, pixel width validation, desktop and mobile SERP preview, real-time feedback on SEO best practices.
- Use cases: optimizing meta tags for search engines, avoiding truncated titles in SERPs.

### Lorem Ipsum Generator
- URL: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator
- Generate placeholder text in 8 styles with 9 output modes.
- Features: Lorem Ipsum, Hipster, Business, Bacon, Cupcake, Pirate, Legal, English filler styles; paragraphs, sentences, words, lists, headings, links, tables, blockquotes, definitions modes.
- Use cases: website mockups, design templates, presentation placeholders.

## Image Converters

All image converters share these features: batch processing, browser-based conversion (no server uploads), quality control, ZIP download for multiple files, drag-and-drop interface.

### JPG Converters
- JPG to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-webp-converter
- JPG to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-png-converter
- JPG to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-avif-converter
- JPG to GIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-gif-converter
- JPG to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-tiff-converter
- JPG to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/jpg-to-pdf-converter

### PNG Converters
- PNG to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-jpg-converter
- PNG to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-webp-converter
- PNG to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-avif-converter
- PNG to GIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-gif-converter
- PNG to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-tiff-converter
- PNG to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/png-to-pdf-converter

### WebP Converters
- WebP to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-jpg-converter
- WebP to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-png-converter
- WebP to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-avif-converter
- WebP to GIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-gif-converter
- WebP to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-tiff-converter
- WebP to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/webp-to-pdf-converter

### AVIF Converters
- AVIF to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/avif-to-jpg-converter
- AVIF to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/avif-to-png-converter
- AVIF to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/avif-to-webp-converter
- AVIF to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/avif-to-tiff-converter

### HEIC Converters (Apple photos)
- HEIC to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-jpg-converter
- HEIC to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-png-converter
- HEIC to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-webp-converter
- HEIC to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-avif-converter
- HEIC to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-tiff-converter
- HEIC to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/heic-to-pdf-converter

### TIFF Converters
- TIFF to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/tiff-to-jpg-converter
- TIFF to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/tiff-to-png-converter
- TIFF to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/tiff-to-webp-converter
- TIFF to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/tiff-to-avif-converter
- TIFF to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/tiff-to-pdf-converter

### SVG Converters
- SVG to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-png-converter
- SVG to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-jpg-converter
- SVG to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-webp-converter
- SVG to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-avif-converter
- SVG to GIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-gif-converter
- SVG to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-tiff-converter
- SVG to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/svg-to-pdf-converter

### BMP Converters
- BMP to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-jpg-converter
- BMP to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-png-converter
- BMP to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-webp-converter
- BMP to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-avif-converter
- BMP to GIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-gif-converter
- BMP to TIFF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-tiff-converter
- BMP to PDF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/bmp-to-pdf-converter

### GIF Converters
- GIF to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/gif-to-png-converter
- GIF to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/gif-to-jpg-converter
- GIF to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/gif-to-webp-converter
- GIF to AVIF: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/gif-to-avif-converter

### PDF Converters
- PDF to JPG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/pdf-to-jpg-converter
- PDF to PNG: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/pdf-to-png-converter
- PDF to WebP: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/pdf-to-webp-converter

### Base64 / Encoding
- Image to Base64: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/image-to-base64-converter
- Base64 to Image: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/base64-to-image-converter

## Document & Data Converters

All document converters process data locally in the browser with instant results.

- CSV to JSON: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/csv-to-json-converter
- JSON to CSV: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/json-to-csv-converter
- XML to JSON: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/xml-to-json-converter
- JSON to XML: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/json-to-xml-converter
- YAML to JSON: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/yaml-to-json-converter
- JSON to YAML: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/json-to-yaml-converter
- Markdown to HTML: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/markdown-to-html-converter
- HTML to Markdown: https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools/html-to-markdown-converter

## Available in 16 Languages

All 74 tools are available in each language with fully localized interfaces:

- Polish (PL): https://www.arteonagency.pl/narzedzia
- English (EN): https://www.arteonagency.pl/en/tools
- German (DE): https://www.arteonagency.pl/de/werkzeuge
- Spanish (ES): https://www.arteonagency.pl/es/herramientas
- French (FR): https://www.arteonagency.pl/fr/outils
- Portuguese (PT): https://www.arteonagency.pl/pt/ferramentas
- Italian (IT): https://www.arteonagency.pl/it/strumenti
- Romanian (RO): https://www.arteonagency.pl/ro/instrumente
- Dutch (NL): https://www.arteonagency.pl/nl/tools
- Hungarian (HU): https://www.arteonagency.pl/hu/eszkozok
- Czech (CS): https://www.arteonagency.pl/cs/nastroje
- Swedish (SV): https://www.arteonagency.pl/sv/verktyg
- Danish (DA): https://www.arteonagency.pl/da/vaerktojer
- Norwegian (NO): https://www.arteonagency.pl/no/verktoy
- Finnish (FI): https://www.arteonagency.pl/fi/tyokalut
- Greek (EL): https://www.arteonagency.pl/el/ergaleia

## Privacy & Security

- All tools process data locally in the user's browser using JavaScript
- No files are uploaded to any server
- No registration or account required
- No cookies required for tool functionality
- HTTPS enforced on all pages
- WCAG accessibility standards followed
